mapper.sql: FROM TBL_BOARD B JOIN TBL_USER U ON U.USER_ID = B.USER_ID WHERE B.IS_ACTIVE = 'Y' AND B.BOARD_TYPE NOT IN ('Q', 'A')

sql.if: AND ( UPPER(B.TITLE) LIKE '%' || UPPER(#{q}) || '%' OR UPPER(DBMS_LOB.SUBSTR(B.CONTENT, 4000, 1)) LIKE '%' || UPPER(#{q}) || '%' OR UPPER(NVL(U.NICKNAME, '')) LIKE '%' || UPPER(#{q}) || '%' OR UPPER(NVL(U.USERNAME, '')) LIKE '%' || UPPER(#{q}) || '%' OR EXISTS ( SELECT 1 FROM TBL_BOARD_ASPECT BA JOIN TBL_BOARD_HASHTAG_LIST HL ON HL.BOARD_HASHTAG_ID = BA.BOARD_HASHTAG_ID WHERE BA.BOARD_ID = B.BOARD_ID AND HL.IS_ACTIVE = 'Y' AND UPPER(HL.BOARD_HASHTAG_NAME) LIKE '%' || UPPER(#{qNoHash}) || '%' ) )

mapper.select:
SELECT * FROM ( SELECT ROWNUM AS RN, X.* FROM ( SELECT B.BOARD_ID AS boardId, B.TITLE AS title, NVL(U.NICKNAME, U.USERNAME) AS writer, TO_CHAR(B.REG_DATE, 'YYYY-MM-DD') AS regDate,
NVL(B.VIEW_COUNT, 0) AS viewCount, NVL(B.LIKE_COUNT, 0) AS likeCount, NVL(B.REPLY_CNT, 0) AS replyCnt,
B.BOARD_TYPE AS boardType, B.TRADE_STATUS AS tradeStatus, B.PRICE AS price,
( SELECT MIN(F.SAVED_NAME) KEEP ( DENSE_RANK FIRST ORDER BY CASE WHEN F.IS_THUMBNAIL = 'Y' THEN 0 ELSE 1 END, CASE WHEN F.FILE_KIND = 'ATTACH' THEN 0 ELSE 1 END, F.FILE_ID ASC ) FROM TBL_BOARD_FILE F WHERE F.BOARD_ID = B.BOARD_ID AND F.IS_ACTIVE = 'Y' AND ( F.CONTENT_TYPE = 'IMAGE' OR F.CONTENT_TYPE LIKE 'image/%' ) ) AS thumbSavedName,
( SELECT MIN(F.SUB_DIR) KEEP ( DENSE_RANK FIRST ORDER BY CASE WHEN F.IS_THUMBNAIL = 'Y' THEN 0 ELSE 1 END, CASE WHEN F.FILE_KIND = 'ATTACH' THEN 0 ELSE 1 END, F.FILE_ID ASC ) FROM TBL_BOARD_FILE F WHERE F.BOARD_ID = B.BOARD_ID AND F.IS_ACTIVE = 'Y' AND ( F.CONTENT_TYPE = 'IMAGE' OR F.CONTENT_TYPE LIKE 'image/%' ) ) AS thumbSubDir,
( SELECT LISTAGG(HL.BOARD_HASHTAG_NAME, ',') WITHIN GROUP (ORDER BY HL.BOARD_HASHTAG_NAME) FROM TBL_BOARD_ASPECT BA JOIN TBL_BOARD_HASHTAG_LIST HL ON HL.BOARD_HASHTAG_ID = BA.BOARD_HASHTAG_ID WHERE BA.BOARD_ID = B.BOARD_ID AND HL.IS_ACTIVE = 'Y' ) AS hashtags,
DBMS_LOB.SUBSTR(B.CONTENT, 4000, 1) AS contentPreview
ORDER BY B.REG_DATE DESC, B.BOARD_ID DESC ) X WHERE ROWNUM <= #{endRow} ) WHERE RN >= #{startRow}
